description: Nominal rigid mount transform from checkerboard frame {CB} to end-effector frame {EE}.

EE.definition: UR3e end-effector/flange (tool0) frame as used by forward kinematics

CB.definition: Checkerboard frame fixed to the calibration pattern
CB.notes: Axes must match the object-point convention used in PnP.

interpretation.rotation: Approximately 180 degrees about the EE y-axis (x and z axes inverted).
interpretation.translation: CB origin is +80 mm in x_EE, -60 mm in y_EE, +12 mm in z_EE relative to EE origin.

assumptions: Rigid mount: transform is constant across all robot configurations.
No calibration refinement applied; values are nominal/assumed.
